title: Media-load system migration — path-into-string cleanup (kill placeholder/silence, keep latents)
description: Workflows already migrated to path-into-string media nodes (MpiLoadImageFromPath / MpiLoadAudio / MpiLoadVideo / MpiString — full file PATH goes into one `string` widget; nodes self-gate on empty string). Clean up ALL app-side + generator + docs remnants of the OLD system (ComfyUI input slots + placeholder.png/ltx_silence.wav staging + _uploadImage upload-name branch). FULL REMOVAL EXCEPT LATENTS: .latent files still stage into ComfyUI input/ (LoadLatent has no path-string node) — keep ComfyUI_00001_/ltx_video_latent_/ltx_audio_latent_ staging, kill only placeholder.png + ltx_silence.wav. Path source is ALWAYS the project folder (gallery or .preview-assets via /project-file?path=), never raw filesystem — reuse-prompt depends on it. Image/mask join video/audio on the imagepath path-resolve branch (drop _uploadImage for local; keep _uploadRemoteMedia for Pod). Preserve the reuse-404 soft-error (input_asset_deleted) when moving image/mask to imagepath. Blocks clean orchestrate runs (generator STAMP steps fail on MpiLoadImageFromPath). Also finishes this session's scripts/workflow-to-api.mjs + scripts/sync-raw-workflows.mjs and references them in add-model/add-app playbooks.
